name: SeldonFrame
description: Instant business OS in 15 seconds. CRM, booking, intake forms, landing page, payments, email automation + living intelligence layer. Supports your own custom domain.
author: @seldonframe
instructions: Paste your website URL or business description → get your full OS in ~15 seconds (hosted on Vercel + Neon). Then customize with natural language or connect your own domain (e.g. 'use myagency.com as my OS domain').
